message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate last 4 modules from emitUniqueBlockStart to nextNameId

Migrated the final 4 modules still using the old emitUniqueBlockStart/emitBlockBreak
pattern to the modern nextNameId() approach:

- html_mod.zig: genEscape, genUnescape (2 functions)
- string_mod.zig: genCapwords (1 function)
- array_mod.zig: genArray (1 function)
- collections_mod.zig: genCounter, genOrderedDict, genDefaultDict, genChainMap (4 discard blocks)

All 308 *_mod.zig files now use consistent unique ID generation.
No more deprecated emitUniqueBlockStart/emitBlockBreak patterns remain.

Verified with successful build - no regressions.
